## Tyranid and Genestealer Cult Mercenaries

#### 0-3 Genestealer (Cost: 2 Glory)

A Tyranids or Genestealer Cults Warband can take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Genestealer | 8”/Infantry | N/A | \+2 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Genestealer is equipped with two Scything Talons. You cannot modify its battlekit in any way.

* **Scything Talon.** Melee, CRITICAL

**Abilities**

* **Dodge.** All attacks made against the Genestealer have \-1 DICE to Hit.  
* **Vanguard Predator.** The Genestealer has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls. It automatically succeeds at all Climb Success Rolls.

**Keywords**  
GENESTEALER CULTS, INFILTRATOR, SKIRMISHER, TYRANID

### Tyranid Mercenaries

#### 0-1 Broodlord (Cost: 6 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Broodlord | 8”/Infantry | N/A | \+3 | \-2 | 50mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Broodlord is equipped with its Broodlord Claws and heavy carapace.You cannot modify its battlekit in any way.

* **Broodlord Claws.** Melee, CLEAVE 2, VICIOUS 10, \+1 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL

The Broodlord knows the following Psychic Powers:

* **The Horror (Effect).** 6”, One Enemy, Immediate, the target must move D3” directly away from the caster. This movement can bring the target into or out of melee, and counts as a Charge and/or Retreat as appropriate.  
* **Mental Onslaught (Attack).** 12”, IGNORE ARMOUR, PSYCHIC, RISKY, STUN  
* **Null Zone (Effect).** 6”, Self or One Ally, End of Turn, the target cannot be targeted or affected by PSYCHIC weapons or abilities, and PSYCHIC Success Rolls cannot be used while within 6” of it.  
* **Psychic Stimulus (Effect).** 12”, One Ally, Immediate, the target can take a Standard Move or Retreat Action.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, FEAR, LARGE, PSYKER 2, STRONG, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Parasite of Mortrex (Cost: 5 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Parasite of Mortrex | 8”/Flying | N/A | \+2 | \-1 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Parasite of Mortrex is equipped with its Barbed Ovipositor. You cannot modify its battlekit in any way.

* **Barbed Ovipositor.** Melee, CLEAVE 2, \+1 INJURY DICE

**Abilities**

* **Parasitic Infection.** The first time the Parasite of Mortrex takes an enemy Out of Action with a melee attack during each Turn, you can place a new Ripper Swarm model as close to that model’s location as possible. Injury rolls made against this Ripper Swarm have \+1 DICE, it does not have TOUGH, and it is not added to your Warband at the end of the battle.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, FEAR, FLYING, LARGE, TYRANID

#### 0-1 Venomthrope (Cost: 3 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Venomthrope | 6”/Flying | N/A | \+1 | \-1 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Venomthrope is equipped with its Toxic Lashes. You cannot modify its battlekit in any way.

* **Toxic Lashes.** Melee, CLEAVE 2, GAS, BLOCK

**Abilities**

* **Foul Spores.** Ranged attacks made against the Venomthrope, and any of the Venomthrope’s TYRANID allies within 6” of it, suffer \-1 DICE to Hit.

**Keywords**  
FLYING, LARGE, TYRANID

#### 0-2 Von Ryan’s Leaper (Cost: 4 Glory)

A Genestealer Cults (Final Day Variant) can take 0-1 Von Ryan’s Leapers.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Von Ryan’s Leaper | 8”/Infantry | N/A | \+2 | \-1 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
A Von Ryan’s Leaper is equipped with two Scything Talons and Enhanced Senses. You cannot modify its battlekit in any way.

* **Scything Talon.** Melee, CRITICAL  
* **Enhanced Senses.** The model can declare a Charge against an enemy it cannot see.

**Abilities**

* **Pouncing Leap.** When an enemy with 12” of the Von Ryan’s Leaper Charges one of the Von Ryan’s Leaper’s allies, the Von Ryan’s Leaper can immediately activate, before the Charge roll is made, if it has not yet activated this Turn. Its first action must be to Charge that enemy, and if it fails to enter close combat, its Activation ends. At the end of this Activation, the enemy’s Activation continues if it is still on the battlefield. Otherwise, normal Activation order continues as if that enemy’s Activation had just ended.  
* **Vanguard Predator.** The Genestealer has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls. It automatically succeeds at all Climb and Jump Success Rolls, has \+1 DICE to Diving Charge Success Rolls.

**Keywords**  
INFILTRATOR, LARGE, STEALTH, TYRANID

#### 0-1 Zoat Negotiator (Cost: 5 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Zoat Negotiator | 5”/Infantry | N/A | \+1 | \-2 | 50mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Zoat Negotiator is equipped with armoured scales, included in its statistics above, as well as an Bio-Flamer, a Heavy Power Fist, and a Rebreather. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Bio-Flamer.** 8”, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR, \-1 INJURY DICE, FIRE  
* **Heavy Power Fist.** Melee, \+1 INJURY MODIFIER, HEAVY, ONE-HANDED, ARMOUR PIERCING 2  
* **Rebreather.** The model has NEGATE GAS.

**Abilities**

* **Disruptive Influence (PSYCHIC).** Enemy models within 6” of the Zoat Negotiator have \-1 to Hit with all attacks.

**Keywords**  
FEAR, LARGE, STRONG, TOUGH, TYRANID

### Genestealer Cult Mercenaries

#### 0-1 Benefictus (Cost: 3 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Benefictus | 6”/Infantry | \+0 | \+1 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Benefictus is equipped with a Force Rod. You cannot modify its battlekit in any way.

* **Force Rod.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword, PSYCHIC, HELD

The Benefictus knows the following Psychic Powers:

* **Might from Beyond (Effect).** \-1 DICE, 12”, Self or One Ally, Target Activation, the target has \+1 DICE to Hit and \+1 INJURY DICE with all melee attacks.  
* **Psionic Blast (Attack).** 12”, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, BLAST 3”, STUN, PSYCHIC, RISKY  
* **Psychic Stimulus (Effect).** 12”, One Ally, Immediate, the target can take a Standard Move or Retreat Action.  
* **Telekine Dome (Effect).** No Range, Self, End of Turn, Injury rolls against the caster and each ally within 3” of it have \-1 DICE.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, GENESTEALER CULTS, PSYKER 2

#### 0-1 Biophagus (Cost: 3 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Biophagus | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Biophagus is equipped with an Autopistol, Chemical Vials, its Injector Goad, and an Alchemicus Familiar. You cannot modify its battlekit in any way.

* **Autopistol.** 12”, ASSAULT, PISTOL  
* **Chemical Vials.** 6”, GAS, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, THROWN  
* **Injector Goad.** Melee, GAS  
* **Alchemicus Familiar.** Once during each battle, as an Action with no roll, the Biophagus can give its attacks with GAS \+1 INJURY DICE during that Activation.

**Abilities**

* **Biological Warfare.** When an enemy model within 6” of the Biophagus suffers any BLOOD MARKERS, one of those BLOOD MARKERS is replaced with an INFECTION MARKER.  
* **Twisted Science.** The Biophagus and its GENESTEALER CULTS allies within 6” of it have CRITICAL with all melee attacks.

**Keywords**  
GENESTEALER CULTS

#### 0-1 Kelermorph (Cost: 4 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Kelermorph | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+0 | \-1 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Kelermorph is equipped with Standard Armor and its Liberator Autostubs. You cannot modify its battlekit in any way.

* **Liberator Autostub.** CRITICAL  
  * Triple Shot: 12”, AUTOMATIC 3, PISTOL  
  * Longshot: 24”, \+1 DICE

**Abilities**

* **Dodge.** All attacks made against the Kelermorph have \-1 DICE to Hit.  
* **Heroic Inspiration.** When the Kelermorph takes an enemy Out of Action with a Liberator Autostub, you can give one other friendly GENESTEALER CULTS model within 6” of it a BLESSING MARKER.  
* **Hypersense.** Once during each Turn, when an enemy model ends its movement within 12” of the Kelermorph, the Kelermorph can make a single ranged attack against that enemy with its Liberator Autostubs’ Triple Shot profile (it cannot make multiple attacks in this way due to AUTOMATIC).

**Keywords**  
ELITE, GENESTEALER CULTS

#### 0-1 Lictor (Cost: 5 Glory)

Only a Genestealer Cults (Final Day Variant) can take this mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Lictor | 8”/Infantry | N/A | \+2 | \-1 | 50mm |

**Battlekit**  
A Lictor is equipped with two Piercing Claws. You cannot modify its battlekit in any way.

* **Piercing Claw.** Melee, CRITICAL, ARMOUR PIERCING 1

**Abilities**

* **Camouflage.** Ranged attacks have \-1 DICE to hit the Lictor.  
* **Feeder Tendrils.** The first time a Lictor causes an enemy to suffer a BLOOD MARKER in melee combat during each of its Activations, you can remove one BLOOD MARKER from the Lictor.  
* **Pheromone Trails.** Allies with DEEP STRIKE or INFILTRATOR can be deployed fully within 3” of this model, even if they are too close to an enemy and/or are visible to an enemy. They still cannot be deployed within close combat range of any enemy.  
* **Vanguard Predator.** The Lictor has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls. It automatically succeeds at all Climb and Jump Success Rolls, has \+1 DICE to Diving Charge Success Rolls.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, FEAR, LARGE, INFILTRATOR, STEALTH, TOUGH, TYRANID

#### 0-1 Locus (Cost: 3 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Locus | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+2 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Locus is equipped with its Barbed Tail and two Blades. It ignores the penalties for making off-hand attacks with these blades. You cannot modify its battlekit in any way.

* **Barbed Tail.** Melee, SHRAPNEL, WHIP 3”. This weapon causes no Injury roll, but still causes a BLOOD MARKER from its SHRAPNEL Keyword. If the Locus hits a target with this weapon that is not LARGE, the model hit is moved in a straight line directly towards the Locus until it is as close as possible.  
* **Blades.** Melee, CRITICAL

**Abilities**

* **Bladed Stance.** When an enemy Charges the Locus, if the Locus has not Activated this Turn, it can immediately take the Fight Action against that enemy before it takes any further actions. This can be done only once per Turn, and the Locus counts as having already taken the Fight Action during its Activation this Turn.  
* **Dodge.** All attacks made against the Locus have \-1 DICE to Hit.  
* **Quicksilver Strike.** The first time the Locus knocks an enemy Down or takes an enemy Out of Action in melee during its Activation, if the locus is not engaged in melee with any other enemy, it can immediately move up to its speed, and can end this movement in close combat. If it ends this movement in close combat, it can take an additional Fight Action, allowing it to attack with both of its Blades.

**Keywords**  
GENESTEALER CULTS

#### 0-1 Reductus Saboteur (Cost: 3 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Reductus Saboteur | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+1 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Reductus Saboteur is equipped with an Autopistol, a Blasting Charge, and a Close Combat Weapon. Its Blasting Charge is replaced at the start of each battle for free. You cannot modify its battlekit in any way.

* **Autopistol.** 12”, ASSAULT, PISTOL  
* **Blasting Charge.** 6”, \+1 INJURY DICE, BLAST 3”, CONSUMABLE, HEAVY, SCATTER. If the Blasting Charge lands directly on top of a model, it ignores that model’s armour. Can be used only once per battle  
* **Close Combat Weapon.** Melee

**Abilities**

* **Plant Explosives.** As an Action with a Success Roll with \+2 DICE, the Reductus Saboteur can mine a piece of terrain they alone are touching, no bigger than 8” x 8” (an 8” section of trench, a wall, a tree, a building etc). If successful, the terrain piece is now MINED.

**Keywords**  
GENESTEALER CULTS, NEGATE MINED, STEALTH

#### 0-1 Sanctus Sniper (Cost: 4 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Sanctus Sniper | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+1 | \-1 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Sanctus Sniper is equipped with Standard Armour, a Sanctus Sniper Rifle, and a Close Combat Weapon. You cannot modify its battlekit in any way.

* **Sanctus Sniper Rifle.** 48”, \+1 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL, RISKY  
* **Close Combat Weapon.** Melee

**Abilities**

* **Creeping Shadow.** The Sanctus Sniper’s ranged attacks have VICIOUS 10 against targets that have not yet activated during the current Turn.  
* **Dodge.** All attacks made against the Sanctus Sniper have \-1 DICE to Hit.

**Keywords**  
GENESTEALER CULTS, INFILTRATOR, STEALTH

#### 0-1 Sanctus Talon (Cost: 3 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Sanctus Talon | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+2 | \-1 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Sanctus Talon is equipped with Standard Armour and a Bio Dagger. You cannot modify its battlekit in any way.

* **Bio Dagger.** Melee, CLEAVE 2, CRITICAL, GAS

**Abilities**

* **Assassinate.** The Sanctus Talon’s melee attacks have VICIOUS 10 if it Charged the target during that Activation.  
* **Dodge.** All attacks made against the Sanctus Talon have \-1 DICE to Hit.

**Keywords**  
GENESTEALER CULTS, INFILTRATOR, STEALTH
